summary_en: NIPPO revised its FY2026 year-end dividend forecast, adding a special dividend of 76 yen per share to the ordinary dividend of 78 yen, raising total year-end payout to 154 yen per share.
title_en: Notice of Revision to Dividend Forecast (Special Dividend)
translation_en_brief:
On 18 May 2026, NIPPO Ltd. announced a revision to its year-end dividend forecast for fiscal year 2026 (ended 31 March 2026). The company has raised its per-share year-end dividend from 78 yen (ordinary dividend) to 154 yen per share, comprising 78 yen ordinary dividend plus an additional 76 yen special dividend.

The revision reflects the company's achievement of cumulative consolidated operating profit targets under its "Medium-Term Management Plan 2025" and attainment of operating profit exceeding 2.0 billion yen in FY2026—a milestone for the company. Management stated this revision aligns with its core capital allocation policy of "sustained dividend increases aligned with sustainable profit growth" and expresses gratitude to shareholders and stakeholders for their long-term support.

The ordinary dividend of 78 yen was originally announced on 13 May 2025. The special dividend of 76 yen has been added based on the capital allocation guidelines disclosed in the medium-term plan.
